g.text: Game of Life — Desktop UI Revamp (4 destinations, left nav rail)
Size · Clear · Randomize · Pattern · Load · Save · Send to Run ▶
▶ Play · ⏸ · Step · Restart · Speed ▭▭▭▭ · Jump → · Load board/run
